name: Date-Nut Logs
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 1 1/4 pounds
1. Blend the butter, corn syrup, and vanilla extract until smooth.
2. Add nonfat dry milk, salt, confectioners' sugar, and finely chopped dates to the mixture. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
3. Shape the mixture into small rolls using a rolling pin or your hands.
4. Dip each roll in chopped nuts. If the nuts do not stick, lightly coat the rolls with additional corn syrup before adding the nuts.
